name: MAC-10 | 纸老虎
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been custom painted with a snarling cat and a target on the rear of the receiver. Kitty's got claws...
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器涂装了一只哈气咪，其枪身尾部的机匣处还印有靶心图案。 咪可是也有爪子的……
